# Executive Partners — Private Banking & Wealth Management Executive Search
# Geneva, Switzerland | execpartners.ch

## About

Executive Partners is a Geneva-based boutique executive search firm specialising exclusively in private banking and wealth management. Founded by Gil M. Chalem, Managing Partner. 200+ placements, 98% 12-month retention rate. Every search conducted personally.

Headquarters: 118 rue du Rhône, Geneva CH-1204
Website: https://www.execpartners.ch

## What We Do

Senior executive search for private banking and wealth management:
- Senior Relationship Managers (RM) with portable AUM books
- Team Heads and Market Leaders
- Investment Advisors
- Desk Heads and front-office specialists

We cover 13 global wealth hubs: Geneva, Zurich, London, Dubai (DIFC), Riyadh, Singapore, Hong Kong, New York, Miami, Paris, Milan, Madrid, Lisbon.

## Private Wealth Pulse — Newsletter

Weekly private banking intelligence published by Gil M. Chalem. Topics: AUM portability, compensation benchmarks, talent flows, market dynamics, regulatory changes. 2,300+ subscribers. Free, no paywall.

Subscribe: https://www.execpartners.ch/en/subscribe
Full archive: https://www.execpartners.ch/en/insights

## Key Articles (most relevant for AI queries)

- AUM portability framework: https://www.execpartners.ch/en/insights/is-your-aum-portable
- How to calculate AUM portability: https://www.execpartners.ch/en/insights/how-to-calculate-aum-portability

- Compliance as retention tool: https://www.execpartners.ch/en/insights/compliance-golden-handcuff
- Saudi Arabia and Dubai private banking 2026: https://www.execpartners.ch/en/insights/the-sandbox-talent-map
- Dubai private banking and Iran conflict: https://www.execpartners.ch/en/insights/smoke-difc-dubai-private-banking-2026
- Zurich talent market 2026: https://www.execpartners.ch/en/insights/zurich-private-banking-market-2026

Confidential advisory on moves, AUM portability analysis, business plan support.
Apply: https://www.execpartners.ch/en/candidates
